candidate_definition_hints.text: This repository contains source code and the HealthVer dataset presented in the paper [Evidence-based Fact-Checking of Health-related Claims]() by Mourad Sarrouti, Asma Ben Abacha, Yassine Mrabet and Dina Demner-Fushman.

candidate_glosses.text: This repository contains source code and the HealthVer dataset presented in the paper [Evidence-based Fact-Checking of Health-related Claims]() by Mourad Sarrouti, Asma Ben Abacha, Yassine Mrabet and Dina Demner-Fushman.
